name: demo_bpdoctor_broken_setup
title: Demo: Set up a pre-broken AnimBP for the T1.A BPDoctor hero GIF
description: Intentionally inserts 5 canonical BPDoctor-detectable bugs into ABP_Trooper_DemoBroken so the hero GIF can showcase a live scan+fix cycle. Run this ONCE before recording T1.A takes. The bugs are reversible — ABP_Trooper itself is untouched.
prerequisites: ABP_Trooper exists and has a MotionMatching node wired into its locomotion state
BionicsBridge + BPDoctor plugins compiled in the target project
warnings: This plan INTENTIONALLY breaks the duplicated AnimBP. Only run against the _DemoBroken copy, never against ABP_Trooper directly.
Re-running is idempotent but re-breaks anything a prior BPDoctor fix-all cleaned up.

steps.description: Bug #1 — Null the MM Database property (triggers MM_NO_DATABASE)
Bug #2 — Delete the Inertialization node after the MM loop (triggers MM_NO_INERTIALIZATION)
Bug #3 — Point a Slot node at a missing slot group (triggers SLOT_NAME_MISMATCH)
Bug #4 — Push LBPB weights off 1.0 sum (triggers BLEND_WT_SUM, auto-fixable)
Compile the broken AnimBP — should emit lint warnings but not crash
Pre-scan screenshot so the demo has a before-state reference frame
